description: Discover how Easy Labs leverages Solana technology to reduce card processing fees for small businesses. Learn about the benefits of using their payment processing solution.
topic_summary: Easy Labs is developing a payment processing solution powered by Solana technology to help small businesses save on card processing fees. [t=0:24] The service aims to reduce merchant processing costs significantly for credit and debit card transactions. [t=12:92] Interested users can get started by visiting Easy.co. [t=29:52]
